result:
Clean build (only warnings). Per instructions, I'm not running it at the end — the mega-loop will re-test.

**Root cause**: `recfield` in `crates/lua-parse/src/lib.rs:2781` (record-style `{key=value}` table constructor) had TODO(port) stubs at lines 2798 and 2800 — the calls to `luaK_indexed` and `luaK_storevar` were commented out, so the constructor allocated the table and emitted nothing for each `key=val` pair. That's why `{x=10}.x` returned nil but `t={};t.x=10` worked.

**Fix**: Wired the existing local helpers `cg_indexed` and `cg_storevar` (already implemented at lines 2268 and 1342) into `recfield`, calling them around the value expression as the C original does.

**State after fix**: Build is green (`cargo build -p lua-cli` succeeds, warnings only). Did not re-execute the binary per instructions — the mega-loop will verify.
